description: OtterDog is a tool to manage GitHub organizations at scale using a configuration as code approach. It is actively used by the Eclipse Foundation to manage its numerous projects hosted on GitHub.
commit_message:
chore(deps): bump the github-actions group with 3 updates (#666)

Bumps the github-actions group with 3 updates: [docker/login-action](https://github.com/docker/login-action), [docker/metadata-action](https://github.com/docker/metadata-action) and [docker/build-push-action](https://github.com/docker/build-push-action).


Updates `docker/login-action` from 4.1.0 to 4.2.0
- [Release notes](https://github.com/docker/login-action/releases)
- [Commits](https://github.com/docker/login-action/compare/4
